message:
🌱 Add podman-container-tools: Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0 mission (#1174)

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-9936-rootless-podman-won-t-work-since-version-3-1-0",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0",
+    "description": "Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**\r\n\n**Description**\n\n> This subject was initially discussed at https://bbs.archlinux.org/viewtopic.php?id=265140."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0",
+        "description": "https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/872 should be ready to merge, but https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/867 does not look like it's ready yet. Once both are, we can cut a fresh release of c/storage and get it vendored into Podman for a 3.1.1. In the meantime, anyone who can manually\n```yaml\nrootless_storage_path = \"$HOME/.local/share/containers/storage\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Rootless Podman won't work since version 3.1.0 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/872 should be ready to merge, but https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/867 does not look like it's ready yet. Once both are, we can cut a fresh release of c/storage and get it vendored into Podman for a 3.1.1.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "rootless_storage_path = \"$HOME/.local/share/containers/storage\"",
+        "rootless_storage_path = \"/home/foo/.local/share/containers/storage\"",
+        "$ podman pull docker.io/archlinux"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
